title: Ability to use numbers in column id
excerpt:
The API for create_column doesn’t support using numbers in the column id.  However, if I create a column without specifying a column id but the title has a number in it, the resulting column id will contain numbers. 
Why…

posts.author: marett (Matt Arett)
posts.cookedHtml:
The API for create_column doesn’t support using numbers in the column id. However, if I create a column without specifying a column id but the title has a number in it, the resulting column id will contain numbers.

Why is the API limited when numbers are supported?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @marett and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Currently the numbers are used to differentiate IDs that are the same in the text of their IDs.

But I have created a request to add the ability to add numbers in a column ID so that our team can take it into account

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

posts.author: DanielHai (Daniel Hai)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @marett

This should now work!!

Happy Programming
